concepts.title: The operator T_p
concepts.blurb: T_p averages index-p sublattices (or cosets) and acts linearly on spaces of modular forms.

concepts.title: Action on q-expansions
concepts.blurb: On coefficients, T_p obeys a'_n=a_{pn}+p^{k-1}a_{n/p}, giving a computable arithmetic rule.

concepts.title: Commuting Hecke algebra
concepts.blurb: The operators T_n commute and generate a commutative algebra, enabling simultaneous diagonalization.

concepts.title: Eigenforms and Euler factors
concepts.blurb: Normalized eigenforms have multiplicative coefficients and Euler products, linking modular forms to Galois and L-functions.
